THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDERSTUDY_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDERSTUDY_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFORMANCE.title: Performance
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFORMANCE.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in your discard pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENTION.title: Intention
THEUNDERSTUDY-FREEZE_UP.title: Freeze Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-STAGE_WHISPER.title: Stage Whisper
THEUNDERSTUDY-RAW_NERVE.title: Raw Nerve
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNGUARDED.title: Unguarded
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_A_BREATH.title: Take a Breath
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_A_BREATH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Invert[/gold] 2 of the last modified [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REPRISE.title: Reprise
THEUNDERSTUDY-REPRISE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Invert[/gold] 3 of the last modified [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TELL_IT_LIKE_IT_IS.title: Tell It Like It Is
THEUNDERSTUDY-TELL_IT_LIKE_IT_IS.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Weak[/gold] equal to the sum of your [gold]invertible[/gold] debuffs.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BARE_IT_ALL.title: Bare It All
THEUNDERSTUDY-BARE_IT_ALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] equal to the sum of your [gold]invertible[/gold] debuffs.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CUE.title: Cue
THEUNDERSTUDY-CUE.description:
Draw 1 card.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attack or skill in your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REHEARSE.title: Rehearse
THEUNDERSTUDY-REHEARSE.description: Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRAM_SESSION.title: Cram Session
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRAM_SESSION.description:
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to 1 attack or skill in hand.
Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to {IntenseSelect:diff()} attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRAM_SESSION.planSelection: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEUNDERSTUDY-OVEREXERT.title: Overexert
THEUNDERSTUDY-QUICK_NAP.title: Quick Nap
THEUNDERSTUDY-ALL_NIGHTER.title: All-Nighter
THEUNDERSTUDY-OPENING_NUMBER.title: Opening Number
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_CENTER_STAGE.title: Take Center Stage
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_CENTER_STAGE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply 2 [gold]Shaken[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWRITE.title: Rewrite
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWRITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 2 attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_TWO.title: Take Two
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_TWO.description: Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from {Select:diff()} attack or skill in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
THEUNDERSTUDY-FLOURISH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Apply 1 [gold]Limited[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_NOTES.title: Take Notes
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_NOTES.description: Whenever a [gold]debuff[/gold] of yours clears, gain {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-FORESHADOW.title: Foreshadow
THEUNDERSTUDY-FORESHADOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attack or skill in your draw pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STANDING_BY.title: Standing By
THEUNDERSTUDY-STANDING_BY.description: Whenever a card becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold], remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 1 {IfUpgraded:show:attack or skill of your choice|random attack or skill} in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STANDING_BY.selectionPromp: Choose a card to remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ARRANGEMENT.title: Arrangement
THEUNDERSTUDY-ARRANGEMENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to 2 attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DA_CAPO.title: Da Capo
THEUNDERSTUDY-DA_CAPO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to this card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ENCORE.title: Encore
THEUNDERSTUDY-ENCORE.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] attacks and skills.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to each attack or skill played this way.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DIMINUENDO.title: Diminuendo
THEUNDERSTUDY-FORTISSIMO.title: Fortissimo
THEUNDERSTUDY-FORTISSIMO.description: All [gold]invertible[/gold] buff and debuff gains are applied {FortissimoPower:diff()} additional {FortissimoPower:plural:time|times}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_YOUR_BOW.title: Take Your Bow
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_YOUR_BOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] in hand.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STEADY_NOW.title: Steady Now
THEUNDERSTUDY-STEADY_NOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Invert[/gold] 2 of the last modified [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CODA.title: Coda
THEUNDERSTUDY-CODA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Invert[/gold] 3 of each [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff you have.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DRESS_REHEARSAL.title: Dress Rehearsal
THEUNDERSTUDY-DRESS_REHEARSAL.descriptio:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold], 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], 1 [gold]Shaken[/gold], 1 [gold]Jaded[/gold], and 1 [gold]Limited[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM.title: Master Form
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM.description: Whenever an attack or skill without Replay becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold], it gains Replay 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE.title: Held Note
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE.description: [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuffs and buffs no longer decrease by 1 each turn.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
THEUNDERSTUDY-FINAL_BAR.title: Final Bar
THEUNDERSTUDY-FINAL_BAR.description:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Planned[/gold] attack or skill you have.
Exhaust all [gold]Planned[/gold] attacks and skills.
THEUNDERSTUDY-EVERYTHING_IVE_GOT.title: Everything I've Got
THEUNDERSTUDY-EVERYTHING_IVE_GOT.descrip:
[gold]Invert[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} of the last modified [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff.
Gain the same inverted buff X more times.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BIG_BREAK.title: Big Break
THEUNDERSTUDY-TOUCH_UP.title: Touch Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-TOUCH_UP.description:
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 1 attack or skill in hand.
Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to {IntenseSelect:diff()} attack or skill in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TOUCH_UP.freeSelectionProm: Choose a card to remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from.
THEUNDERSTUDY-WIDE_OPEN.title: Wide Open
THEUNDERSTUDY-WIDE_OPEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_FIRST_LESSON.title: The First Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-STANDING_ROOM.title: Standing Room
THEUNDERSTUDY-STANDING_ROOM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply [gold]Weak[/gold] equal to the sum of your [gold]invertible[/gold] debuffs to ALL enemies.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HOUSE_LIGHTS.title: House Lights
THEUNDERSTUDY-HOUSE_LIGHTS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] equal to the sum of your [gold]invertible[/gold] debuffs to ALL enemies.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FULL_VOICE.title: Full Voice
THEUNDERSTUDY-FULL_VOICE.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-NIGHT_SHIFT.title: Night Shift
THEUNDERSTUDY-NIGHT_SHIFT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Apply 1 [gold]Jaded[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REMIX.title: Remix
THEUNDERSTUDY-REMIX.description: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] attacks and skills in a random order.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_SECOND_LESSON.title: The Second Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_SECOND_LESSON.descript:
Obey my [gold]Orders[/gold].
If you do, you'll be [gold]Rewarded[/gold].
Otherwise, you'll be [gold]Punished[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_FINAL_LESSON.title: The Final Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_FINAL_LESSON.descripti:
Why are you hurting? Stop getting hurt.
This will all be over soon. To the count of 3.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON.title: My Own Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON.description:
[gold]Invertible[/gold] debuff gains become buffs.
[gold]Invertible[/gold] buff gains become debuffs.
